name: Risk Sentinel — Open-Meteo Climate Anomalies Ingestion

nodes.name: Schedule (Every 3h)
nodes.notes: Polls Open-Meteo every 3 hours for climate anomaly data across trade-critical zones

nodes.name: Generate Zone Requests
nodes.notes: Generates Open-Meteo API requests for 15 trade-critical climate zones

nodes.name: Open-Meteo — Archive Data
nodes.notes: Fetches 21-day temperature and precipitation archive for each zone

nodes.name: Detect Climate Anomalies
nodes.notes: Detects temperature/precipitation anomalies and assesses trade impact per zone
